text: rimwe na rimwe kandi nkagira kutihanganira urumuri/urusaku. byabaye gake cyane guturuka mu ibyiruka ryanjye-ubu mfite imyaka 41, igihe biheruka kuba nararutse,ndakonja ndanatitira
hypothesis: rimwe na rimwe kandi agira kutihanganira urumuri cyangwa se urusaku byabaye gake cyane guturuka mu mibyiruka ijyange wumvite imyaka mirongo ine n'umwe ni igihe bihuruka kuba nararutse ndakonja ndanatitira

text: Namaze kubona ko iyo mbyutse kare cyane maze nkasubira kuryama nk'igice cy'isaha mbyuka meze gutya. Nanone kandi nariye isukari nyinshi cyane mugihe cy'ikiruhuko.

text: Mukwa 2 kuyu mwaka nazanye ikibyimba mwibere ryanjye  basanga atari kanseri Gusa muganga yambwiye ko biterwa numusemburo witwa aldactone
